mapper.select: SELECT no,title,content,login_id,TO_CHAR(regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') as dbday, hit,state FROM QNA WHERE step=0 ORDER BY no DESC , step ASC OFFSET #{start} ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY
SELECT CEIL(COUNT(*)/10.0) FROM QNA WHERE step=0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qna WHERE step = 0
SELECT no, title, content, TO_CHAR(regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') as dbday, hit, login_id, state, group_id FROM qna WHERE no = #{no}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna(no, login_id, title, content,pwd, group_id, step, indent, state) VALUES(qna_no_seq.nextval, '관리자', #{title}, #{content}, 'admin', #{group_id}, 1, 1, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT no,title,content,login_id,TO_CHAR(regdate,'YYYY-MM-DD') as dbday FROM qna WHERE group_id = #{group_id} AND step = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE qna SET state=1 WHERE no=#{no}
